description: Style Notedkny Women EDP Spray/vaporisateur, comes in a white flacon and its a perfume with unusual and magical components; a cold, strict and elegant fragrance for daily and office use.Product DetailsTop notes are orange, apricot, tomato leaf and mandarin orange;  middle notes are yellow narcissus, cassia, orchid, water lily, jasmine, yellow water lily, heliotrope, ylang-ylang and rose and base notes are sandalwood, amber, patchouli, birch and suedeCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize50 ml
